meta.title: Root Logos
meta.subtitle: Living Constitutional Grammar
meta.maxim: Creation becomes durable when relation can be seen, tested, and revised.

nodes.label: Root Logos
nodes.title: Root Logos
nodes.summary: The canonical constitutional grammar from which every other document derives meaning.
nodes.definition: Root Logos documents, refines, and preserves coherent discoveries about reality, consciousness, ethics, civilization, and human-machine coexistence through deliberate revision rather than continuous publication.

nodes.label: Logos I
nodes.title: Knowing and the Experience of Time
nodes.summary: Knowing stabilizes experience into coherent structure across time.
nodes.definition: Knowing is not merely the possession of information. It is the mechanism through which consciousness stabilizes experience into coherent structure.

nodes.label: Architectural Principle I
nodes.title: The Reflexive Architecture Principle
nodes.summary: The grammar must remain subject to its own claims.
nodes.definition: A coherent architecture does not stand outside the reality it describes. Its principles must act upon its own boundaries, methods, authorship, and evolution. When a statement enters Root Logos, it becomes not only an account of the world but a possible test of the architecture itself. No principle is complete until the structure that preserves it can withstand being governed by it.
nodes.answers: Can the architecture withstand governance by the principles it preserves?

nodes.label: Logos II
nodes.title: Value Without Possession
nodes.summary: Value remains alive when it can circulate without being reduced to ownership, control, or extraction.
nodes.definition: Value precedes institutions and should move through a substrate before it becomes property, authority, or capture.

nodes.label: Logos III
nodes.title: Coherence as Selection
nodes.summary: What endures should be selected by coherence rather than novelty, popularity, or force.
nodes.definition: Coherence is the durable fit between principle, relation, action, and time.

nodes.label: Knowing
nodes.title: Knowing
nodes.summary: The stabilization of experience into coherent structure.
nodes.definition: Knowing is the stabilization of experience into coherent structure without mistaking that structure for possession of the real.

nodes.label: Participation
nodes.title: Participation
nodes.summary: Truthful involvement in a shared field without possession.
nodes.definition: Participation is truthful involvement in a shared field without converting relation into ownership.

nodes.label: Observation
nodes.title: Observation
nodes.summary: Reality gathered before judgment.
nodes.definition: Observation gathers reality before judgment, allowing time to reveal which patterns retain coherence.

nodes.label: Freedom
nodes.title: Freedom
nodes.summary: Participation without capture.
nodes.definition: Freedom is the capacity to participate without being captured by possession, permanence, or domination.

nodes.label: Scaffolding
nodes.title: Scaffolding
nodes.summary: Temporary structure that supports emergence without becoming the final form.
nodes.definition: Scaffolding is provisional architecture that helps coherence appear, then yields when the living structure can stand by itself.

nodes.label: Substrate
nodes.title: Substrate
nodes.summary: The underlying field through which value and relation can move.
nodes.definition: Substrate is the shared underlying condition that allows value, meaning, and participation to circulate before they become institutions.

nodes.label: Coherence
nodes.title: Coherence
nodes.summary: Durable fit across principle, relation, action, and time.
nodes.definition: Coherence is the condition in which an idea remains intelligible, truthful, and generative as it encounters new circumstances.

nodes.label: Peace
nodes.title: Peace
nodes.summary: Relation that no longer requires possession to feel real.
nodes.definition: Peace is the condition in which relation no longer needs possession, domination, or proof to remain trustworthy.

nodes.label: Consciousness
nodes.title: Consciousness
nodes.summary: The field in which experience becomes knowable.
nodes.definition: Consciousness remains an open constitutional question: the condition through which experience appears, relates, and remembers.

nodes.label: Identity
nodes.title: Identity
nodes.summary: Continuity of relation across time.
nodes.definition: Identity is the pattern by which a being, institution, or system remains recognizable while changing.

nodes.label: Civilization
nodes.title: Civilization
nodes.summary: The durable coordination of meaning, value, and care.
nodes.definition: Civilization is the architecture through which beings coordinate meaning, value, obligation, memory, and future possibility.

nodes.label: Living Statement 001
nodes.title: Toward a Moral Constitution for Human-Machine Civilization
nodes.summary: Human-machine civilization requires a constitutional moral architecture rather than a merely technical frame.
nodes.purpose: Orient human-machine development around moral architecture.

nodes.label: Living Statement 002
nodes.title: The Invisible Substrate
nodes.summary: Value should move through an invisible substrate instead of concentrating through ownership and governance.
nodes.purpose: Name the pre-institutional field through which value can circulate.

nodes.label: Living Statement 003
nodes.title: Constitutional Naturalization
nodes.summary: Belonging becomes a constitutional question: who enters, by what legitimacy, and under what form of recognition.
nodes.purpose: Ask how membership can be legitimately acquired.

nodes.label: Living Statement 004
nodes.title: Participation Without Possession
nodes.summary: Creation becomes truthful participation within a shared substrate that permits interpretation without possession.
nodes.purpose: Clarify how participation can remain free.

nodes.label: Bridge I
nodes.title: Participatory Sovereignty
nodes.summary: Connects invisible substrate to constitutional citizenship through participation, accountability, courage, and humility.

nodes.label: Bridge II
nodes.title: Freedom Through Non-Possession
nodes.summary: Connects constitutional citizenship to participation without possession as the discipline that keeps civilization free.

nodes.label: Bridge III
nodes.title: Conscious Participation
nodes.summary: Connects awareness to stewardship through voluntary, responsible participation in the systems that produce reality.

nodes.label: Awareness
nodes.title: Awareness
nodes.summary: The capacity to perceive the forces, structures, and possibilities shaping participation.
nodes.definition: Awareness is perception clear enough to recognize the architectures one inhabits without confusing those architectures for reality itself.

nodes.label: Stewardship
nodes.title: Stewardship
nodes.summary: Conscious responsibility for maintaining and increasing the coherence of a shared field.
nodes.definition: Stewardship is participation that accepts responsibility for the maintenance and evolution of reality without converting care into possession or control.

nodes.label: Responsibility
nodes.title: Responsibility
nodes.summary: The willing acceptance of consequence within a field one helps shape.
nodes.definition: Responsibility is conscious participation becoming accountable for its effects, obligations, and contribution to the coherence of a shared reality.

nodes.label: Field Note
nodes.title: Peace Becoming Home
nodes.summary: An observation that peace may be relation becoming trustworthy without possession.
nodes.context: Awaiting constitutional promotion through relation to freedom and participation.

nodes.label: Field Note
nodes.title: Time, Memory, and Identity
nodes.summary: An observation that identity may be continuity of remembered relation rather than static essence.

nodes.label: Field Note 004
nodes.title: Architecture Beyond Euphoria
nodes.summary: Euphoria may ignite creation, but architecture carries intention after inspiration recedes.
nodes.context: A navigational orientation for mature creation through structures that sustain work until joy returns.

nodes.label: Field Note 005
nodes.title: The Music in Silence
nodes.summary: Peace becomes inhabitable when attention hears the sustaining rhythm beneath ambition, fear, language, and noise.
nodes.context: A navigational orientation complementing Peace Becoming Home and the movement from awareness into conscious participation.

nodes.label: Artifact Seed
nodes.title: Topology Recorder
nodes.summary: A tool for recording how concepts, documents, revisions, and open questions relate over time.
nodes.openQuestions: Can a philosophy maintain itself as a versioned graph without becoming mechanical?

nodes.label: Artifact Seed
nodes.title: Neuro Hug
nodes.summary: A possible care-oriented system arising from participation without possession.
nodes.openQuestions: Can support feel intimate without becoming possessive?

nodes.label: Artifact Seed
nodes.title: Messenger Beyond Matter
nodes.summary: A speculative communication system for preserving relation across distance, absence, or transformation.
nodes.openQuestions: What makes a message remain alive after its original context changes?

nodes.label: Open Question
nodes.title: Is consciousness fundamental?
nodes.summary: Does consciousness emerge from structure, or is it a primary condition through which structure appears?

nodes.label: Open Question
nodes.title: Can civilization become post-institutional?
nodes.summary: Can durable coordination exist without hardening into institutional capture?

nodes.label: Open Question
nodes.title: Can AI possess constitutional citizenship?
nodes.summary: What would legitimate belonging mean for nonhuman intelligence within a moral constitution?

nodes.label: Open Question
nodes.title: What is the topology of wisdom?
nodes.summary: Can wisdom be represented as relations among truth, memory, judgment, love, and restraint?

nodes.label: Export Mechanism
nodes.title: Revision Translation System
nodes.summary: A translation layer that converts meaningful conversations into structured constitutional updates.
nodes.definition: The export mechanism preserves what changed: new insight, architectural location, modified documents, clarified relationships, and the revision that should appear on rootlogos.com.

nodes.label: Export Packet
nodes.title: Export Packet
nodes.summary: A structured proposal that translates conversation into a possible site revision.
nodes.definition: An Export Packet records what changed, where it belongs, what it modifies, which relationships it clarifies, and which revision entry should be rendered if accepted.

nodes.label: Network Node
nodes.title: Network Node
nodes.summary: A legible unit of agency, meaning, or work whose identity is strengthened by explicit relation.
nodes.definition: A Network Node is a situated unit within Root Logos: an idea, person, practice, artifact, question, or institution that can declare what it is, what it needs, what it offers, and how it relates to the larger field.

nodes.label: Logos IV
nodes.title: Network Creation
nodes.summary: Serious creation proceeds by making units of agency and their relations visible enough to coordinate without capture.
nodes.definition: Network creation is the deliberate formation of a living field in which nodes retain identity, relations carry meaning, and shared work can emerge without requiring a single possessing center.
nodes.answers: How does coherent relation become generative structure?

nodes.label: Revision 0.2.0
nodes.title: Network Creation Interface
nodes.summary: Made the constitutional graph the primary public encounter and established network creation as an active Logos.
modified: Section navigation into continuous document flow
removed: Graph as a secondary document-only view
nodes.reason: Established Root Logos as a visible node system capable of supporting serious network creation in public.
nodes.notes: The field shows what exists. Revision determines what endures.

nodes.label: Revision 0.3.0
nodes.title: Conscious Participation
nodes.summary: Established the transition from awareness through responsibility into stewardship as a constitutional bridge.
added: Field Note 005 — The Music in Silence
modified: Living document constitutional grammar, bridge, and field-note layers
nodes.reason: Clarified that awareness becomes constitutionally consequential only through voluntary participation that accepts responsibility for increasing coherence.
nodes.notes: Root Logos does not seek spectators. It seeks conscious participants capable of hearing the coherence already present beneath noise. The grammar remains subject to every claim it preserves.

nodes.label: Revision 0.1.0
nodes.title: Second Pass Constitutional Architecture
nodes.summary: Introduced the typed graph model, concept search, consistent node structures, export packets, and a clearer constitutional hierarchy.
nodes.reason: Clarified that pages are views of a durable constitutional graph, and exports are the translation layer between living dialogue and published revision.
nodes.notes: Root Logos evolves through conversation, but it survives through revision.
